title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S.-Iran Strikes Risk Dangerous New Phase
summary_full: The exchanges of fire this week have raised fears of a return to all-out war. The U.S. military struck another tanker it said was carrying Iranian oil and three Indians were reported killed in an earlier American attack at sea.
